description: Configuration for RPC regression testing V2

comments.defaultTolerance: Default tolerance in percentage for numeric comparisons (0.001 = 0.001%)
comments.methodTolerances: Method-specific tolerances override the default. Balance methods need higher tolerance due to time-based calculations.
comments.normalizeFields: Fields to remove before comparison. Includes dynamic data (timestamp, blockNumber) and lossy decimal convenience fields (crc, circles, staticCircles) that are derived from precise atto values
comments.expectedFailures: Tests that are expected to fail (e.g., network state, new features not in production)
